title: 7th Pass Jobs 2026 – Faculty, Office Assistant and More
shortInfo: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Faculty/Office Assistant/Attendant/Watchman. Candidates with Graduate, 7th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Central Bank of India official website.

basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Faculty, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Faculty/Office Assistant/Attendant/Watchman. Candidates with Graduate, 7th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Central Bank of India official website.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the Central Bank of India Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (any i.e. Science/Commerce/Arts/Post Graduate; preference to MSW/MA in Rural Dev./MA in Sociology/Psychology/B.Sc. (Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing)/B.A with B.Ed.) for Faculty, Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge for Office Assistant, Matriculate for Attendant, Passed 7th Standard for Watchman/Gardener
qualification.details: Attendant: Shall be a Matriculate Watchman/Gardener: Should have passed 7th Standard Faculty: Shall be a Graduate (any i.e. Science/Commerce/Arts/Post Graduate; however preference will be given to MSW/MA in Rural Dev. /MA in Sociology /Psychology /B.Sc. (Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing)/B.A with B.Ed. Office Assistant: Shall be a Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge.

salary_details.salary: Faculty: Rs. 30000/month, Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/month, Attendant: Rs. 14000/month, Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Central Bank of India recruitment is 02-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in this Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Faculty/Office Assistant/Attendant/Watchman in this recruitment drive by the Central Bank of India.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Central Bank of India recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 22 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Attendant and Watchman posts?
faq.answer: For the Attendant post, candidates must be Matriculate. For the Watchman/Gardener post, candidates should have passed the 7th Standard.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Attendant and Watchman/Gardener posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Attendant post is Rs. 14000/month, and for the Watchman/Gardener post, it is Rs. 12000/month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Personal Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Central Bank of India. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Which city and state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Hoshangabad city in Madhya Pradesh state, with a pincode of 461001.
